response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid software engineering experience across full-stack, embedded, and data-integration domains, with recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq. However, the resume lacks demonstrable depth in production GenAI/LLM systems, RAG architectures, vector databases, and multi-agent frameworks — all core requirements for a Staff Forward Deployed GenAI role. No clear evidence of customer-facing technical leadership in AI delivery or cloud-based AI system design at scale.
strengths: Strong polyglot engineering background with TypeScript/Node.js and 13+ years shipping production systems
Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
Demonstrated teaching/mentoring through workshops, courses, and conference talks
concerns: No explicit experience with RAG, vector databases, or LLM evaluation/observability pipelines
Limited evidence of major cloud platform AI system design (AWS CDK mentioned, but not AI-focused)
No track record of customer-facing technical discovery or forward-deployed enterprise delivery
